CVE-2024-4367.title: A type check was missing when handling fonts in PDF.js, which wou ...
CVE-2024-4367.description: A type check was missing when handling fonts in PDF.js, which would allow arbitrary JavaScript execution in the PDF.js context. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 126, Firefox ESR < 115.11, and Thunderbird < 115.11.

CVE-2025-43228.title: The issue was addressed with improved UI. This issue is fixed in  ...
CVE-2025-43228.description: The issue was addressed with improved UI. This issue is fixed in Safari 18.6, iOS 18.6 and iPadOS 18.6. Visiting a malicious website may lead to address bar spoofing.

CVE-2025-66286.title: An API design flaw in WebKitGTK and WPE WebKit allows untrusted w ...
CVE-2025-66286.description:
An API design flaw in WebKitGTK and WPE WebKit allows untrusted web content to unexpectedly perform IP connections, DNS lookups, and HTTP requests. Applications expect to use the
WebPage::send-request signal handler to approve or reject all network requests. However, certain types of HTTP requests bypass this signal handler.
